steps: File NTA Form 11 refund claim with MUFG Custody for JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo dividend
Provide Norwegian tax residency certificate to confirm eligibility for JP-NO treaty 10% rate vs standard 20.42%
Submit supporting documentation showing correct treaty rate application and calculation discrepancy
Follow up with MUFG within 30 days if no acknowledgment of refund processing

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
